text: Computer vision enables computers to interpret and understand the visual world through images and videos. One key task is image recognition, where a system identifies what an image contains, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further, locating specific objects within an image and drawing boxes around them. These technologies have many practical applications. For instance, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars to navigate safely. It is also used in facial recognition, medical imaging, and even in retail for automated checkout systems.
